title: Token Cost Lab — See What a Prompt Actually Costs
tagline: Paste a prompt, pick your models, and watch the per-request cost light up across GPT-5.6, Claude Sonnet 5, Grok 4.5 and more — tokenized 100% in your browser, no API key.
description: In-browser LLM cost calculator: real tokenizer + editable July-2026 pricing across GPT-5.6, Sonnet 5, Grok 4.5. Day 4 of kb-daily-builds.
